title: Fresh Wolves Variants
description: Make wolves variants of Vanilla or Backported Mod compatible with Fresh Animations
body:
### This resource pack is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!
---
A simple resourcepack to make wolves variants in Vanilla or in Mod [Backported Wolves](https://modrinth.com/mod/backported-wolves/versions) Compatible with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations).

**If you are using Backported Wolves mod, you need to install both of the contents mentioned above, just put this resourcepack above Fresh Animations.**
